CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-02-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-03-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Sanctions; Declarations Of Joseph E. Tomasik And Jessie L. Butala In Support
Off Calendar Nov-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Andrea Del Moral's Motion To Vacate Order And Sanctions is granted in part, denied in part, as follows:
a. Motion to vacate order to compel response to supplemental interrogatories and request for production of documents denied;
b. Motion to vacate sanctions granted. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn To Vacate Order And Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Andrea Del Moral's motion to vacate order and sanctions is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. Code of Civil Procedure Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on September 4, 2008. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2008 Set For Trial On Jan-12-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Compel Responses To Supplemental Inerrogatory & Supplemental Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Michelle Preston's motion to compel responses to supplemental interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve verified responses and produce documents within 10 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount $320 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
